title: DFU - Emu/Tern - Charge Case update needed popup after earbud DFU
scenario: After completing a DFU for earbuds, verify that a "Case Update Needed" popup appears on the Device Home Screen instructing the user to use the Poly Lens Desktop app for case updates.
steps: Ensure the charge case and earbuds are on outdated firmware.
Perform a Device Firmware Update (DFU) for the earbuds.
Observe the Device Home Screen after the DFU completes.
expected: A popup appears on the Device Home Screen stating "Case Update Needed" with a message that earbuds have been updated but case updates must be made using the Poly Lens Desktop app.
